footnotes.text: Many translate "the Just One," and see here some allusion to the Passion and Death of Christ. More probably the expression refers to the class of the just who offered no resistance.
According to the teaching of the Council of Trent (Sess. 14, c. 3) St. James promulgated here the Sacrament of Extreme Unction. Presbyters: certainly here in the sense of "priests."
